title: Hostile Passenger Incidents
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM MissionAccepted WHERE PassengerMission = 1 AND PassengerWanted = 1 AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {total} passenger mission(s) involving wanted or hostile passengers accepted during the report period. Carrying a wanted passenger means every interdiction is a potential firefight — even one is a story worth noting, and a pattern of wanted-passenger run reveals either a very lucrative risk tolerance or a somewhat desperate financial situation.
details.help: MissionAccepted PassengerWanted = 1 flags missions where passengers have active warrants. total drives the title as the risk exposure count.

tagLines: Hostile passenger transport incidents noted. Wanted-status passenger carriage log compiled.
The mission board warned you. You took it anyway. That says something about your appetite for complications.
Wanted passengers pay better than innocent ones. The premium is called an inconvenience fee. And it's earned.
